subtasks.description: Extract all party names, their roles (e.g., Buyer, Seller, Service Provider, Guarantor), and contact addresses from the multi-party contract document.

plan.cost_rationale: Single extract subtask at mid tier. The task requires structured multi-field extraction across potentially multiple parties and roles with address parsing. Mid tier is appropriate because the extraction involves inferring party relationships and normalizing address fields across a complex document structure, not just simple field lookup. No dependencies needed; all fields can be extracted in one call.
